innateAbility.name: Leviathan's Catch
innateAbility.description: Whenever an enemy hero dies while affected by debuff sources sourced to Tidehunter, a fish spawns within their death location.Tidehunter can eat the fish to permanent grant self various stat bonuses.

abilities.name: Gush
abilities.description: Damages the unit-targeted enemy, and reduces its movement speed and armor.

abilities.name: Kraken Shell
abilities.description: Passively damage block a portion of any incoming physical attack damage.

abilities.name: Anchor Smash
abilities.description: Instantly attacks and reduces all enemy units' main attack damage within the radius.The effect radius scales correspondingly to Tidehunter's current attack range.

abilities.name: Dead in the Water
abilities.description: Attaches and leashes a heavy anchor to an enemy hero.Attempting to move a certain distance from the anchor sets its movement speed value and forces the affected unit to drag the Anchor behind them.

abilities.name: Ravage
abilities.description: Damages and stuns all enemy units within the radius.

talents.right: Kraken Shell Dispel Procs Anchor Smash
